heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about any of the methods or types discussed in this
guide, see the following API documentation:

- [MongoClient](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html)

- [Db](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Db.html)

- [Collection](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html)

- [MongoClientOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html)

- [ClientSessionOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/ClientSessionOptions.html)

- [TransactionOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/TransactionOptions.html)

- [DbOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/DbOptions.html)

- [CollectionOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/CollectionOptions.html)

- [collation](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/CreateCollectionOptions.html#collation)
